text:
Once there was a boy named Sammy who loved exploring. Every evening after dinner he'd sprint out of his cozy bedroom and dive into the woods behind his house. There he'd find treasures: forgotten stones, buzzing bees, juicy berries. Sammy wasn't only gathering goodies; he was finding friends.

One day, Sammy discovered a sparkling waterfall. It shimmered like an enchanted pond. He slid down its icy cascade, feeling free. But halfway down, his sneakers slipped. SPLASH! He plunged into cold water. Panic!

He paddled energetically upstream. Birds tweeted warnings.

After wandering aimlessly, he stumbled upon a glade. Sunlight danced. Dozens of mushrooms gleamed. Sammys pawed cautiously. Suddenly, one gave way. He withdrew astonished—a strange bunny peeked out.

"What's this?" it piped up.

Sammy blurted out his adventure.

"Lemme see!" The bunny sniffed. Then hopping excitedly. "I know something about swimming
